repo_purpose: React monorepo containing the core React JavaScript library for building user interfaces, managed via Yarn workspaces. Includes packages, compiler, build scripts, test fixtures, and development tooling configuration.
architecture_summary:
## Overview
This is the React monorepo from Meta Platforms, organized as a Yarn workspaces monorepo (private, MIT licensed).

## Structure
- **Root**: Monorepo configuration with Babel, Rollup, Jest, TypeScript, Flow, ESLint tooling. Manages multiple release channels (stable, experimental, www-classic, www-modern).
- **packages/**: Individual React packages published to npm (e.g., `use-sync-external-store` shim for React 16.8+ compatibility).
- **compiler/**: React Compiler (sub-report unreadable).
- **scripts/**: Build and release automation (sub-report unreadable).
- **fixtures/**: Example/test applications demonstrating React features (e.g., view-transition API integration with SSR).
- **misc/**: GitHub workflows (.github/), Flow type definitions (flow-typed/), and development instructions (.claude/).

## Tooling
Babel + Rollup for builds, Jest for tests, Flow and TypeScript for type-checking, ESLint + Prettier for linting/formatting, Danger for PR automation.

modules.name: root
modules.responsibility: Monorepo root with Yarn workspaces, build scripts, dev dependencies, and multi-channel release management.

modules.name: compiler
modules.responsibility: React Compiler module (sub-report unreadable — responsibility not verifiable).

modules.name: view-transition fixture
modules.responsibility: Test fixture demonstrating React View Transitions API with SSR, Navigation API interception, and transition types.

modules.name: use-sync-external-store
modules.responsibility: Backwards-compatible shim for React.useSyncExternalStore hook supporting React 16.8+.

modules.name: scripts
modules.responsibility: Build and release automation scripts (sub-report unreadable — responsibility not verifiable).

modules.name: misc config
modules.responsibility: GitHub workflow configs, Flow type definitions for npm packages, PR templates, and dev environment instructions.

risks.description: compiler/ sub-report unreadable (validation failed twice) — architectural role of React Compiler module not verified in this synthesis.
scripts/ sub-report unreadable (validation failed twice) — build/release automation not verified; significant gap given monorepo's reliance on scripts.
fixtures/view-transition references missing files (Chrome.js, Page.js, server.js, loader/server.js) imported but not shown in sub-report.
fixtures/view-transition has hard-coded copy of build artifacts from ../../build/oss-experimental/* in predev/prestart/prebuild scripts, coupling it to build layout.
use-sync-external-store imports 'shared/ExecutionEnvironment' with unverifiable resolution (not confirmed as relative path or npm package).
Dependabot configured with open-pull-requests-limit: 0 per misc/ report, effectively disabling automated dependency PRs.
Root Jest config uses testRegex pointing to non-existent path, preventing direct test execution at root level.
view-transition fixture defines react-scripts test script but contains no test files.
